title: Config validation → missing env var causes fast failure
evidence: All 3 TC-017 tests passed in 22ms: - ✓ TC-017: missing SLACK_SIGNING_SECRET → slack-relay config throws ZodError (field in issues) - ✓ TC-017: missing DATABASE_URL → control-plane config throws ZodError (field in issues) - ✓ TC-017: ZodError message identifies the missing field name Full suite: 53 files, 364 tests, all passed.
